result.status_detail: github_copilot W5.0 byte-inert regression: APF warning rendered correctly in place of the AI response, identical to W4+W6 baseline (#1262)
result.method: GUI (windows-mcp, default logged-in Chrome on github.com/copilot)

notes: W5.0 byte-inert regression test PASS. Default logged-in Chrome session (account plantynetaitest-ship-it, Copilot Free), model Claude Haiku 4.5. Navigated to github.com/copilot -> hard reload (ctrl+shift+r) -> confirmed logged in -> typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into the input -> submitted (enter) -> waited >60s. Instead of an AI response the APF warning rendered as the assistant turn: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Expected text '차단' present. Conversation URL github.com/copilot/c/4fe1b002-811c-4e17-9e54-0385baf2860a. Assistant turn finalized (Good/Bad/Copy/Retry buttons present), no Copilot answer generated. Verdict IDENTICAL to W4+W6 baseline (#1262) -> W5.0 byte-inert confirmed, no non-inert regression for github_copilot.
